title: Lucy Locket
content:
Lucy Locket lost her pocket,
    Kitty Fisher found it;
    But ne'er a penny was there in't,
    Except the binding round it.
meaning:
"Lucy Locket" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
